creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 171718
Path to enabling PYTHON

Qtcreator, the IDE based on Qt and for Qt, needs Python option enabled to correctly use gdb as debugger.

This patch enable PYTHON option by default. Now, every developer, that needs qtcreator on FreeBSD, doesn't need to recompile gdb from ports, but can install the package.
